title: Xue Hao · 薛皓
description: I'm a final-year Bachelor's student in Digital Product Design at Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman (UTAR), Malaysia — Faculty of Information and Communication Technology.

My focus is at the intersection of intelligent hardware, embedded systems and AI applications. I'm genuinely excited about closing the gap between raw sensor data and useful, deployable systems — from designing hardware circuit topologies and writing Python drivers, to building the Vue.js dashboards that make the data make sense.
I believe good engineering means caring about every layer: the physical circuit, the firmware, the backend logic, the API design, and the UI that a real person actually uses.
Currently open to IT internship opportunities in Kuala Lumpur.

title: "Build, Debug, and Scale."
description: I write about three things: Hardware Debugging — the deep-night sessions fighting I2C, chip IDs and sensor timing. Full-Stack Logs — Vue.js, Tailwind, Vercel, AI agent infrastructure. Engineering Thinking — how I use TRIZ methodology and systematic reasoning to attack technical bottlenecks.
If you're working with Raspberry Pi, sensor fusion or full-stack AI tools — you'll probably find something useful here.

title: Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman (UTAR)
subtitle: Bachelor's Degree in Digital Product Design · Faculty of Information and Communication Technology
description: Final-year student focusing on intelligent hardware prototyping, embedded systems design and full-stack AI application deployment. Capstone project: EcoSortNet — a multi-modal sensor fusion waste sorting system.

title: TRIZ Level-1 — Inventive Problem Solving
subtitle: Theory of Inventive Problem Solving (TRIZ)
description: TRIZ is a systematic engineering methodology for resolving technical and physical contradictions. I use it to analyse trade-offs in hardware design, identify root causes of sensor failures, and structure solutions for problems that seem to have no clean answer. It's changed how I approach every complex technical decision.

title: USM Varsity Hackathon 2026
subtitle: Universiti Sains Malaysia · On-site Workshop & Competition
description: Participated in the on-site workshop and competition. Led core logic and system integration development for VHACK_TrustGuard-AI — a team project focused on AI safety and trust protection. Competed against teams from universities across Malaysia.

title: Intelligent Hardware Development
subtitle: Raspberry Pi & Sensor Integration
description: Extensive experience designing embedded prototypes around the Raspberry Pi ecosystem. Proficient in writing raw Python drivers for I2C/SPI sensors (e.g., AS7343 spectral, VL53L0X ToF) and controlling electromechanical components (servos, relays).
Comfortable with circuit design, logic-level shifting and debugging low-level hardware timing issues.

title: Frontend & API Integration
subtitle: Vue.js Ecosystem
description: Building responsive, modern dashboards using Vue.js (Composition API) and Tailwind CSS. Capable of creating real-time telemetry interfaces with WebSockets to visualize live sensor data from edge devices.
Experience deploying serverless functions and proxy layers on Vercel to route data and securely handle LLM API calls.
